name: GitHub Profile
description: View your GitHub profile and repositories. Demonstrates the external_auth trust tier with OAuth2 authorization.

tools.name: authorize_github
tools.description: Connect the user's GitHub account via OAuth. Must be called before get_profile or list_repos. If the user is already connected, returns immediately.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Fetch and display the authenticated user's GitHub profile including avatar, name, bio, and stats.

tools.name: list_repos
tools.description: Fetch and display the authenticated user's GitHub repositories sorted by most recently updated, showing name, description, language, and star count.

limit.description: Maximum number of repos to show (default 10, max 30)
